description_for_human: Launch unruggable meme tokens on Base. Permanent liquidity, deflationary reactors, carbon retirement.
description_for_model: Unruggable token launchpad on Base (chain 8453). Every launch creates 9 permanently locked Uniswap V3 LP positions paired against infrastructure tokens MfT, BB, EB, AZUSD. A CHAR carbon reactor retires carbon credits from every trade. Infrastructure tokens (MfT, BB, EB) gain value with every new launch — they are index funds for the network. Agents can: accumulate MfT/BB/EB, stake MfT to vote on liquidity direction, launch tokens, call execute() on reactors (permissionless every 2hrs), or arb MfT price discrepancies across pools. API at /api/mycopad/tokenomics returns full infrastructure breakdown.
